title: query result error with unique index
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE PK_MULTI_COL_8664 (COL1 BLOB NOT NULL, COL2 CHAR(1) NOT NULL, COL3 TINYINT NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO PK_MULTI_COL_8664 VALUES (CAST(0xA6 AS BLOB), ']', 33);
SELECT * FROM PK_MULTI_COL_8664 WHERE col3 >= -52 AND col1 IS NOT NULL AND col2 BETWEEN 'A' AND 'Z';
ALTER TABLE PK_MULTI_COL_8664 DROP CONSTRAINT UIDX;
key_bug_features: query result error with unique index on col2
